---
title: "Stack"
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# My Stack

<p class="lead">The tools, frameworks, and systems I build with</p>

:::

<div class="stack-intro">

I ship full-stack AI products — from database schema to deployed frontend. This is the toolkit I reach for, why I chose it, and how it fits together.

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

## Frontend

<div class="stack-grid">

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/nextjs/nextjs-original.svg" alt="Next.js" />
</div>
<h3>Next.js</h3>
<p>My primary framework. App Router, server components, and seamless Vercel deployment make it the fastest path from idea to production for full-stack web apps.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/react/react-original.svg" alt="React" />
</div>
<h3>React</h3>
<p>Component architecture that scales. Every frontend I've shipped — CareBridge Connect, Peptide Portal, Eternally — is built on React's composability model.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/typescript/typescript-original.svg" alt="TypeScript" />
</div>
<h3>TypeScript</h3>
<p>Non-negotiable for production systems. Type safety catches bugs before they reach users and makes large codebases navigable without memorizing every interface.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/tailwindcss/tailwindcss-original.svg" alt="Tailwind CSS" />
</div>
<h3>Tailwind CSS</h3>
<p>Utility-first CSS that makes design decisions explicit in markup. Eliminates the naming problem and keeps styles co-located with components.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

## Backend & Data

<div class="stack-grid">

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/supabase/supabase-original.svg" alt="Supabase" />
</div>
<h3>Supabase</h3>
<p>PostgreSQL with auth, real-time subscriptions, Row Level Security, and storage — all in one. My default backend for any product that needs multi-user data with security constraints.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/postgresql/postgresql-original.svg" alt="PostgreSQL" />
</div>
<h3>PostgreSQL</h3>
<p>The database I think in. Relational modeling, RLS policies, and complex joins for systems where data integrity is non-negotiable — especially healthcare applications.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/fastapi/fastapi-original.svg" alt="FastAPI" />
</div>
<h3>FastAPI</h3>
<p>Python API framework for AI-heavy backends. Used in Compass for the signal processing pipeline — automatic OpenAPI docs, async support, and seamless OpenAI integration.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Secondary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/python/python-original.svg" alt="Python" />
</div>
<h3>Python</h3>
<p>Data manipulation, automation scripts, API backends, and LLM orchestration. The lingua franca for anything touching AI infrastructure.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

## AI & LLM Infrastructure

<div class="stack-grid">

<div class="stack-card stack-card--featured">
<div class="stack-icon stack-icon--dark">
<svg viewBox="0 0 41 41" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;">
  <path d="M37.532 16.87a9.963 9.963 0 0 0-.856-8.184 10.078 10.078 0 0 0-10.855-4.835 9.964 9.964 0 0 0-7.505-3.348 10.079 10.079 0 0 0-9.612 6.977 9.967 9.967 0 0 0-6.664 4.834 10.08 10.08 0 0 0 1.24 11.817 9.965 9.965 0 0 0 .856 8.185 10.079 10.079 0 0 0 10.855 4.835 9.965 9.965 0 0 0 7.504 3.347 10.078 10.078 0 0 0 9.617-6.981 9.967 9.967 0 0 0 6.663-4.834 10.079 10.079 0 0 0-1.243-11.813ZM22.498 37.886a7.474 7.474 0 0 1-4.799-1.735c.061-.033.168-.091.237-.134l7.964-4.6a1.294 1.294 0 0 0 .655-1.134V19.054l3.366 1.944a.12.12 0 0 1 .066.092v9.299a7.505 7.505 0 0 1-7.49 7.496ZM6.392 31.006a7.471 7.471 0 0 1-.894-5.023c.06.036.162.099.237.141l7.964 4.6a1.297 1.297 0 0 0 1.308 0l9.724-5.614v3.888a.12.12 0 0 1-.048.103l-8.051 4.649a7.504 7.504 0 0 1-10.24-2.744ZM4.297 13.62A7.469 7.469 0 0 1 8.2 10.333c0 .068-.004.19-.004.274v9.201a1.294 1.294 0 0 0 .654 1.132l9.723 5.614-3.366 1.944a.12.12 0 0 1-.114.012L7.044 23.86a7.504 7.504 0 0 1-2.747-10.24Zm27.658 6.437-9.724-5.615 3.367-1.943a.121.121 0 0 1 .114-.012l8.048 4.648a7.498 7.498 0 0 1-1.158 13.528v-9.476a1.293 1.293 0 0 0-.647-1.13Zm3.35-5.043c-.059-.037-.162-.099-.236-.141l-7.965-4.6a1.298 1.298 0 0 0-1.308 0l-9.723 5.614v-3.888a.12.12 0 0 1 .048-.103l8.05-4.645a7.497 7.497 0 0 1 11.135 7.763Zm-21.063 6.929-3.367-1.944a.12.12 0 0 1-.065-.092v-9.299a7.497 7.497 0 0 1 12.293-5.756 6.94 6.94 0 0 0-.236.134l-7.965 4.6a1.294 1.294 0 0 0-.654 1.132l-.006 11.225Zm1.829-3.943 4.33-2.501 4.332 2.497v4.998l-4.331 2.5-4.331-2.5V18Z" fill="currentColor"/>
</svg>
</div>
<h3>OpenAI API</h3>
<p>GPT-4o and GPT-4o Mini for reasoning tasks, content generation, and structured outputs. Used in Consulting Agent for SCQA structuring and in CareBridge for guardrailed family chat.</p>
<span class="stack-tag stack-tag--ai">AI Core</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card stack-card--featured">
<div class="stack-icon stack-icon--dark">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;">
  <path d="M4.5 6.375a4.125 4.125 0 1 1 8.25 0 4.125 4.125 0 0 1-8.25 0ZM14.25 8.625a3.375 3.375 0 1 1 6.75 0 3.375 3.375 0 0 1-6.75 0ZM1.5 19.125a7.125 7.125 0 0 1 14.25 0v.003l-.001.119a.75.75 0 0 1-.363.63 13.067 13.067 0 0 1-6.761 1.873c-2.472 0-4.786-.684-6.76-1.873a.75.75 0 0 1-.364-.63l-.001-.122ZM17.25 19.128l-.001.144a2.25 2.25 0 0 1-.233.96 10.088 10.088 0 0 0 5.06-1.01.75.75 0 0 0 .42-.643 4.875 4.875 0 0 0-6.957-4.611 8.586 8.586 0 0 1 1.71 5.157v.003Z" fill="currentColor"/>
</svg>
</div>
<h3>Claude (Anthropic)</h3>
<p>My primary development partner via Claude Code — used for complex reasoning chains, code architecture, and long-context analysis. Also powering AI Pulse's editorial curation pipeline.</p>
<span class="stack-tag stack-tag--ai">AI Core</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon stack-icon--dark">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;" fill="white">
  <path d="M12 0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12s5.373 12 12 12 12-5.373 12-12S18.627 0 12 0zm5.562 8.248-1.97 9.289c-.145.658-.537.818-1.084.508l-3-2.21-1.447 1.394c-.16.16-.295.295-.605.295l.213-3.053 5.56-5.023c.242-.213-.054-.333-.373-.12l-6.871 4.326-2.962-.924c-.643-.204-.657-.643.136-.953l11.57-4.461c.537-.194 1.006.131.833.932z"/>
</svg>
</div>
<h3>Grok (xAI)</h3>
<p>Real-time web and X.com data access for AI Pulse. Used for sourcing and initial drafting of weekly editions — the only model with live internet access at the speed I need.</p>
<span class="stack-tag stack-tag--ai">AI Tooling</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/docker/docker-original.svg" alt="Docker" />
</div>
<h3>Docker</h3>
<p>Containerized deployments for backend services. Used in Compass to package the FastAPI signal processing pipeline for consistent local and cloud environments.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Secondary</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

## Dev Workflow

<div class="stack-grid">

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/vercel/vercel-original.svg" alt="Vercel" style="filter: invert(1);" />
</div>
<h3>Vercel</h3>
<p>Every product I ship deploys here. Zero-config CI/CD, preview deployments on every branch, and Next.js-native infrastructure. The fastest path from commit to production.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/github/github-original.svg" alt="GitHub" style="filter: invert(1);" />
</div>
<h3>GitHub</h3>
<p>Version control and CI triggers for all projects. Every repo linked to Vercel for automatic preview and production deploys on merge.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon stack-icon--dark">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;">
  <path d="M3 3h18v18H3V3zm16.525 13.707c-.131-.821-.666-1.511-2.252-2.155-.552-.259-1.165-.438-1.349-.854-.068-.248-.078-.382-.034-.529.113-.484.687-.629 1.137-.495.293.09.563.315.732.676.775-.507.775-.507 1.316-.844-.203-.314-.304-.451-.439-.586-.473-.528-1.103-.798-2.126-.775l-.528.067c-.507.124-.991.395-1.283.754-.855.968-.608 2.655.427 3.354 1.023.765 2.521.933 2.712 1.653.18.878-.652 1.159-1.475 1.058-.607-.136-.945-.439-1.316-1.002l-1.372.788c.157.359.337.517.607.832 1.305 1.316 4.567 1.249 5.153-.754.021-.067.18-.528.056-1.237l.034.049zm-6.737-5.434h-1.686c0 1.453-.007 2.898-.007 4.354 0 .924.047 1.772-.104 2.033-.247.517-.886.451-1.175.359-.297-.146-.448-.349-.623-.641-.047-.078-.082-.146-.095-.146l-1.368.844c.229.473.563.879.994 1.137.641.383 1.502.507 2.404.305.588-.17 1.095-.519 1.358-1.059.384-.697.302-1.553.299-2.509.008-1.541 0-3.083 0-4.635l.003-.042z"/>
</svg>
</div>
<h3>Claude Code</h3>
<p>AI-assisted development environment that handles architecture discussions, complex debugging, and cross-file refactors. This entire portfolio was built with it.</p>
<span class="stack-tag stack-tag--ai">AI Dev</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/vscode/vscode-original.svg" alt="VS Code" />
</div>
<h3>VS Code</h3>
<p>Primary editor with TypeScript IntelliSense, ESLint, and Tailwind CSS IntelliSense. Pairs with Claude Code for the development workflow on every project.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

</div>

<div class="divider"></div>

## Data & Analytics

<div class="stack-grid">

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/python/python-original.svg" alt="Python" />
</div>
<h3>Python (Data)</h3>
<p>Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib for financial modeling and data analysis. Used at Nucleus Fund for market research synthesis and at Genesis Bank for acquisition modeling.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Primary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/microsoftsqlserver/microsoftsqlserver-original.svg" alt="SQL" />
</div>
<h3>SQL / VBA</h3>
<p>Database querying and Excel automation for financial workflows. VBA for automating repetitive due diligence tasks — request list generation, model population, and report formatting.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Secondary</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon stack-icon--dark">
<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="width:32px;height:32px;">
  <path d="M0 3.449L9.75 2.1v9.451H0m10.949-9.602L24 0v11.4H10.949M0 12.6h9.75v9.451L0 20.699M10.949 12.6H24V24l-12.9-1.801"/>
</svg>
</div>
<h3>CapIQ / FactSet</h3>
<p>Financial data infrastructure for investment research. Used at Genesis Bank for acquisition due diligence and at Nucleus Fund for comparable company analysis and market sizing.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Finance</span>
</div>

<div class="stack-card">
<div class="stack-icon">
<img src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/devicons/devicon/icons/cloudinary/cloudinary-original.svg" alt="Cloudinary" />
</div>
<h3>Cloudinary</h3>
<p>Media management, AI image enhancement, and transformation pipelines. Used in Eternally for photo restoration and optimization across memorial galleries.</p>
<span class="stack-tag">Secondary</span>
</div>

</div>

<style>
.stack-intro {
  font-size: 1.125rem;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  max-width: 680px;
  margin: 0 auto 1rem;
  line-height: 1.75;
  text-align: center;
}

.stack-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr));
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}

.stack-card {
  background: var(--surface);
  border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: 1.75rem;
  transition: all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  position: relative;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.stack-card:hover {
  border-color: var(--brand);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(43, 108, 238, 0.1);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}

.stack-card--featured {
  border-color: rgba(43, 108, 238, 0.3);
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--surface) 0%, rgba(43, 108, 238, 0.03) 100%);
}

.stack-icon {
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}

.stack-icon img {
  width: 40px;
  height: 40px;
  object-fit: contain;
}

.stack-icon--dark {
  background: #1d1d1f;
  border-radius: 10px;
  width: 52px;
  height: 52px;
  padding: 10px;
  color: white;
}

.stack-card h3 {
  font-family: 'Syne', sans-serif;
  font-size: 1.0625rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.625rem;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
}

.stack-card p {
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  line-height: 1.65;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
}

.stack-tag {
  display: inline-block;
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  padding: 0.25rem 0.625rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: var(--surface-alt);
  color: var(--text-muted);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}

.stack-tag--ai {
  background: rgba(43, 108, 238, 0.08);
  color: var(--brand);
  border-color: rgba(43, 108, 238, 0.2);
}
</style>
